evidence.quote: Review Protein–Protein Interaction (PPI) Network of Zebrafish Oestrogen Receptors: A Bioinformatics Workflow
We used zebrafish proteins, the oestrogen receptors (ERs) to build and analyse the PPI network... using bioinformatics tools and PPI databases
This review aims to demonstrate the workflow and step-by-step instructions for constructing a PPI network... ultimately benefit aquaculture research
help to predict potential interaction between proteins

initial_request_score.fix_suggestion: No changes needed; all fields are fully supported by the abstract and title.

evidence.quote: Cytoscape version 3.8.2 was used as the network integration, analysis, and visualisation platform
requirement of Java installation... https://cytoscape.org/download.html
Shannon, P.; Markiel, A.; Ozier, O.; Baliga, N. Cytoscape... Genome Res. 2003
D. rerio was selected... ESR1, ESR2a, and ESR2b... confidence score was set at a high confidence value, 0.9... maximum additional interactors... set to 5
A total of eight proteins or nodes... with 20 interactions/edges were constructed using STRING
Szklarczyk, D... The STRING database in 2021... Nucleic Acids Res. 2021
The generated PPI network consisted of 23 proteins with 226 interactions... contains duplicated edges
Franz, M... GeneMANIA update 2018. Nucleic Acids Res. 2018
Display name of STRING network and gene name of GeneMANIA were selected as matching attributes... 'Enable merging nodes/edges in the same network' box was unticked
generated 28 proteins with 234 interactions
Shannon, P.; Markiel, A.; Ozier, O.; Baliga, N. Cytoscape... Genome Res. 2003
